phone_number.description: The user's phone number (following the E.164 recommendation).

blocked.description: Whether this user was blocked by an administrator (true) or not (false).

email_verified.description: Whether this email address is verified (true) or unverified (false). User will receive a verification email after creation if `email_verified` is false or not specified

phone_verified.description: Whether this phone number has been verified (true) or not (false).

picture.description: A URI pointing to the user's picture.

user_id.description: The external user's id provided by the identity provider.

connection.description: Name of the connection this user should be created in.

password.description: Initial password for this user. Only valid for auth0 connection strategy.

verify_email.description: Whether the user will receive a verification email after creation (true) or no email (false). Overrides behavior of `email_verified` parameter.

username.description: The user's username. Only valid if the connection requires a username.
